C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\solaris-port.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\solaris-port.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\solaris-port.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -g -shared -o libsolaris-port.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libsolaris-port.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\solaris-port.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\solaris-port.dir\linkLibs.rsp
